source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

powers.description: Tired of picking up all those Bananas yourself? So is this guy but at least he's paid to do it. Farmer will auto-gather all Bananas in his radius so you don't have to.

Bring Cringer from Masters of the Universe TM to the Bloon battlefield! Activate the transformation into Battle Cat for 4 rounds. Fully powered Battle Cat hits Bloons hard, also tearing away Camo property and Bloon immunities.
Monkey Engineering at its finest, this trap will remove Camo state from the first 500 Bloons that touch it. 2 Camo Traps with every purchase.
Need a quick cash top-up? Get Monkey Command to fire down one of these bad boys stacked with cash asap!
Cave Monkey smash Bloon with club. Bloon so scared Bloon stop.
If sometimes things just move too quickly, use Time Stop to briefly halt all action so you can focus on managing your monkeys.
Let's Energize! This totem will increase attack speed of all Monkeys in range by 25%. Lasts 5 rounds and can be recharged.
This sticky trap will slow the first 300 Bloons that go over it before it disappears. 2 Glue Traps with every purchase.
Recover 100 lives.
A powerful mine that detects the presence of MOAB-Class Bloons and will explode causing lots of damage. MOAB Mine will detonate on 10 targets before expiring.
Let's turn it up to 11! All towers attack twice as fast for 15 seconds.
Hype up your Monkeys with a High Intensity Hype ability boosting all Monkeys in radius.
Place almost any land tower on water with the Pontoon! Deploy the pontoon on water, then place your land tower on top.
Nowhere to float your boat? Smart monkeys know they can place a Portable Lake on land, allowing any water unit to be deployed within its waters.
A huge stack of Road Spikes ready to lay down wherever you need them most! 5 piles of Road Spikes with every purchase.
Summon She-Ra's Sword to strike at Bloons with incredible power. Reduces ability cooldown time for She-Ra and He-Man.
Summon Skeletor's Havoc Staff from Masters of the Universe TM to throw Tek Bombs on the screen, stunning and damaging Bloons, while Skeletor claims cash from the Bloons.
Recover 25% Stamina for your entire Posse.
A placeable Super Monkey Beacon with a Beacon Storm ability on a long cooldown.
It's a bird. It's a plane. It's a squadron of flying super-powered laser-beamin' monkeys who destroy every single Bloon on screen and do big damage to MOAB-Class Bloons.
He-Man's Sword of Power falls from the sky, regularly releasing a surge of power to pop Bloons and generate Mana Shield. He-Man and She-Ra attack faster while the Sword of Power is active.
Tech Bot can activate your Abilities for you, as soon as they are ready for optimum efficiency.
Wow wow wow! Tech Bot Prime can trigger abilities automatically, place multiple ambush points, and look great doing it!
Increase cash production from all of your towers and Bloon pops by 25% for the rest of the round and the entire next round!
